info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SozaRe ' iti svAmI  anye sarve ' gatiSozaRayoH ' ityeva paWanti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ya AgacCettaM brUyAcCaRaSulbena jihvAM nirmfjAnaH SAlAyAH praskandeti' (kO॰sU॰25.22) nizkrAma nizpata niryAhItyarTaH
'vAsudevastato yogI pracaskanda mahAraTAt' (BA॰BIzma॰106.56) pracaskanda=avacaskanda=avatatAra
'samutkzipya nadan krudDaH pracaskanda raTottamAt' (BA॰droRa॰15.4) pracaskanda=avapupluve
'praskandayecca manasA BuktvA cAgnimupaspfSet' (BA॰anu॰104.56) annaSezaM tyajet ityarTaH
'SoRitodAM raTAvartAM nAganakrAM duratyayAm nadIM praskandayizyAmi paralokapravAhiRIm (BA॰vi॰61.20) pravAhayizyAmItyAha
'tato raTAByAM praskanDa BrAtarO kzatriyarzaBO' (BA॰vi॰33.5) praskanDa=praskadya=avatIrya
'agnipraskandanaparastvaM cApyevaM Bavizyasi' (BA॰Adi॰84.26) praskandanaM SrOtasmArtAdyagnisADyakarmatyAgaH
'tatrAvahasitaScAsItpraskandanniva samBramAt' (BA॰Adi॰1.136) praskandan sKalan
'ete vinihatAH sarve praskannAH pARquvAhinIm '(BA॰Salya॰18.22) praskannAH prapannAH
'yanmuKena (striyaM na spfSati) tenAgnipraskandinA (lokAnavarunDe) (go॰brA॰pU॰2.4) agnipraskandinAm = jvalitahiraRyaretasyAtmAnaM juhvatAm
'prARaM vA ete skandanti ye divA ratyA saMyujyante' (praSnopa0 113) praskandanti vikiranti
'snehapraskannamanasA mayEtat samudIritam' (rA0 5387) praskannaM SiTilamiti BUzaRakAraH
'jagmustatra tato devIM vizRumAyAM pratuzwuvuH' (durgA0 57) pratuzwuvuH stotumAreBire praSabda AdikarmaRi anarTako vA
'gatvA nanAma taM kfzRaM pratuzwAva yaTAgamam' (brahmavE0 pu0 41591) ukto'rTaH
'kaTayituM prAstAvIt' (harza0) prAstAvIt prArabDa
'bfhaspatiraBikanikradad gA uta prAstOt' (tE0 saM0 341143) meGasanniDAnAdinA vfzwyA'BimuKyavatIH kftavAnityarTa iti BawwaBAskaraH
'dfzwvA mAdyati modate'Biramate prastOti vidvAnapi' (pra0 ca0 48) prastOti punaH punastadevAraBate
'(BUteSvaram) dvEtaDvAntamapAsya yAnti kftinaH prastOmi taM pUruzam' (pra0 ca0 614) prastOmi tAtparyeRa pratipAdayAmi
'yaTepsitaM prastuta karma Darmyam' (Bawwi0 228) prastuta prAraBaDvam pustake tvanyaTA gfhItamanyaTA ca vyAKyAtam tacCoDyam
'tatropamantritastena prastuto Boktum' (bf0 ka0 ma0 vetAla 1170) prastutaH prArabDaH pravfttaH
'gantuM kiM yujyate putri prastAve'tra BayAvahe' (bf0 ka0 ko0 6725) prastAvo'vasaraH
parAcita-parAskanda-parajAta-parEDitA ityamaraH parAskando BftyaH
skanDo vfkzasya samAskanno Bavati' (ni0 6174) samAskanna AkrAntaH (SAKABiH)
'purImavaskanda lunIhi nandanam' (SiSu0 151) avaskanda=AkrAma
'sa nadyavaskandamupAspfSacca' (Bawwi0 211) nadI nadImavaskadyAvatIryetyAha
'avaskandaM karizyAmi Sibire'syAdya duzkaram' (BA0 sOptika0 327) avaskandaH=AkramaRam
'na nAma pratibanDena na cAvaskandakarmaRA Sakya eza giristAta devErapyavamarditum' (hari0 24245) avaskandena=uparyutplavanena
'raTAdavaskandya' (BA0 pu0 103826) avaskandya=avaplutya
'nadyavaskandamupAspfSacca' (Bawwi0 211) nadyavaskandamiti Ramulantam avaskandya=avatIrya
'cayamAskandati BasmanAM janaH' (ki0 220) BasmanAM caye rASO padaM niDatta ityarTaH
'kaTamidAnImunmAdoparAgo mADavendumAskandati' (mAlatI0 9) Askandati AkrAmati aBiBavati
'AskandallakzmaRaM bAREH' (Bawwi0 1782) ukto'rTaH
'tAni punaramUni pratiniyatArTavizayavfttyA vedamAskandanti' (niruktopodGAte durgaH) Askanda utplutyArohaRam
'dattAskando vahan (pakzI) pfzWe Saktidevam alakzitam' (kaTA0 2636) AskantidatamaSvAnAM gativiSezaH
'na hi siMho gajAskandI BayAd giriguhASayaH' (raGu0 1752) gajamAskandati plutyArohatIti gajAskandI
'AskandI dakziRArDasya… kInASo gIyate dvijEH' (kaTA0 2487) AskandI dAtA vadAnyaH udAraH
'aDiskanda vIrayasva garBamADehi yonyAm' (aTarva0 5258) aDiskanda Aroha
'gOryatrADizkannA nyamehat' (tE0 saM0 228) nyamehat bahutaraM mUtrayati aDizkannA sanDinI vfzaBArUQA
'pitA yat svAM duhitaramaDizkan' (f0 10617)
'te spandrAso nokzaRo'ti zkandanti SarvarIH' (f0 5523) atiyAntItyarTaH
'aBicaskanda vandaneva vfkzam' (aTarva0 71202) aBito vyAptA vartata ityarTaH
'tadyaTA giriSiKarAd gartamaBipraskandet' (SAM0 brA0 261) KAtamaBiprapatedityarTaH atawaprapAto vivakzitaH

'arTinA leKito yorTaH pratyarTI yadi taM taTA prapadya kAraRaM brUyAtpratyavaskandanaM smftam' (yAjYa0 27 mitAkzarAyAM nAradavacanam) pratyavaskandanaM nAma satyaM gfhItaM pratidattaM pratigraheRa vA labDamityevaMrUpamuttaram
'meGanAdaH pariskandan parizkandantamASvarim' (Bawwi0 975) pariskandan paritaH krAman
'BUmne parizkandam' (tE0 brA0 347) parizkandaH paricArakaH

'pariskandaH prAcyaBaratezu' (pA0 8375) iti prAcyaBaratezu prayogavizaye pUrveRa prApto mUrDanyaH pratiziDyate anyatra yaTAprAptaM zatvaM Bavati parAcitapariskandaparajAtaparEDitA iti BftyanAmasvamaraH
'BUtaM ca Bavizyacca parizkandO' (aTarva0 1526) parizkandaH paricArakaH yaH Kalu raTena samaM DAvati
'parizkandA raTasyAsan sarvatodiSamudyatAH' (BA0 karRa0 3443 ) parizkandAH pArSvagopAH
'Arohe paryavaskande saraRe sAntaraplute' (BA0 BIzma0 768) paryavaskandaH plutyA hastyAdiByo'vataraRam
